info.description: REST API for managing Users, Groups, and Organizations with RBAC support
info.title: KitaManager API

get.description: Get a paginated list of all government fundings

post.description: Create a new government funding (superadmin only)

get.description: Get a single government funding by its ID with nested periods and properties

parameters.description: Limit number of periods returned (0 = all, default 1 for latest only)
parameters.name: periods_limit

put.description: Update an existing government funding by ID (superadmin only)

delete.description: Delete a government funding by ID (superadmin only)

post.description: Create a new period for a government funding (superadmin only)

put.description: Update an existing period by ID (superadmin only)

delete.description: Delete a period by ID (superadmin only)

post.description: Create a new property for a period (superadmin only)

put.description: Update an existing property by ID (superadmin only)

delete.description: Delete a property by ID (superadmin only)

get.description: Check the health status of the API and its dependencies
Check if the API process is alive

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password, returns JWT token

get.description: Get a paginated list of all organizations
Get a single organization by its ID

put.description: Update an existing organization by ID

get.description: Get a paginated list of all children in the specified organization
get.summary: List all children in an organization

post.description: Create a new child in the specified organization

get.description: Calculate government funding for all children with active contracts on a given date

parameters.description: Date for calculation (YYYY-MM-DD format, defaults to today)
parameters.name: date

get.description: Get a single child by their ID

put.description: Update an existing child by ID

get.description: Get all contracts for a child

post.description: Create a new contract for a child

get.description: Get the currently active contract for a child

put.description: Update an existing contract by ID

get.description: Get a paginated list of all employees in the specified organization
get.summary: List all employees in an organization

post.description: Create a new employee in the specified organization

get.description: Get a single employee by their ID

put.description: Update an existing employee by ID

get.description: Get all contracts for an employee

post.description: Create a new contract for an employee

get.description: Get the currently active contract for an employee

put.description: Assign a government funding to an organization (superadmin only)

delete.description: Remove the government funding assignment from an organization (superadmin only)

get.description: Get a paginated list of groups within a specific organization

post.description: Create a new group within an organization

get.description: Get a single group by its ID within an organization

put.description: Update an existing group by ID within an organization

delete.description: Delete a group by ID within an organization

get.description: Get a paginated list of users who are members of any group in the specified organization
Check if the API is ready to accept traffic
Get a paginated list of all users
Get a single user by their ID

put.description: Update an existing user by ID

post.description: Add a user to a group with a specific role (admin, manager, or member)
post.summary: Add user to group with role

put.description: Update a user's role within a specific group

delete.description: Remove a user from a group

get.description: Get all group memberships for a user with effective organization roles

post.description: Add a user to an organization's default group with member role

delete.description: Remove a user from all groups in an organization

put.description: Set or unset a user's superadmin status. Requires superadmin access.

attributes.description:
Contract properties - care type and extras are stored in Attributes
e.g., ["ganztags", "integration_a", "ndh"]

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
